name: Catan
description: Trade, build, and settle the island of Catan.

name: Monopoly
description: Buy properties and bankrupt your friends.

name: Activity
description: Guess words through drawing, acting, and describing.

name: Dungeons & Dragons
description: A cooperative fantasy role-playing adventure game.

name: Secret Hitler
description: A social deduction game of deception and hidden roles.

name: Poker
description: A classic card game of strategy, betting, and bluffing.

name: Codenames
description: A word association game where teams guess secret agents.

name: Ticket to Ride
description: Build train routes across countries and complete destination tickets.

name: UNO
description: Match colors and numbers and be the first to get rid of your cards.

name: Exploding Kittens
description: A chaotic card game of luck, strategy, and exploding cats.

name: Risk
description: A global domination strategy board game.

name: Carcassonne
description: Build landscapes and claim cities, roads, and fields.

name: Pandemic
description: Cooperative game where players work together to stop global disease outbreaks.

name: Splendor
description: Collect gems and build a Renaissance trading empire.

name: Azul
description: A tile-placement game about creating beautiful mosaic patterns.

name: The Resistance
description: A social deduction game of trust, betrayal, and hidden spies.
